• Procedural mining world with dynamic day/night cycle and fog‑of‑war.
  • Mobile‑friendly UI, custom textures, shop, inventory, trade, and admin host election.
  • Audio engine with separate volume controls, engine/drill sounds, and timer blips.
    const Game = new GameEngine();
    Game.init();

This page creates a mining game where players navigate a procedurally generated map, mine ores, build structures, and trade items. The interface adapts to mobile controls, supports custom textures, and includes music, sound effects, and a host‑election system for multiplayer sessions.
